hero.text: Believe in your dreams and they may come true; believe in yourself and they will come true.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is a powerful day for new beginnings. Channel your energy into a project that excites you.
aries.love: Romance is in the air, and you may find unexpected sparks with someone special.
aries.career: Your leadership qualities will shine today, making you a natural choice for new responsibilities.

taurus.general: Stability is key today. Focus on building solid foundations in both personal and professional realms.
taurus.love: Trust plays a vital role in your relationships. Open up to your partner for deeper connection.
taurus.career: It's a great time to network and build relationships that can lead to future opportunities.

gemini.general: Communication is your superpower today. Use it wisely to connect with those around you.
gemini.love: Your charm will attract romantic interests. Be open to new encounters.
gemini.career: Creative ideas are flowing. Don't hesitate to share your vision with your team.

cancer.general: Today may bring emotional insights that help you understand yourself better.
cancer.love: Nurture your relationships with kindness and empathy.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts when it comes to decision making; they will lead you to success.

leo.general: Self-expression is paramount. Don't shy away from showcasing your true self today.
leo.love: Your enthusiasm in love can be contagious. Enjoy the attention you receive.
leo.career: A leadership opportunity might arise; be ready to step up.

virgo.general: Detail-oriented work will pay off today. Focus on what needs to be done.
virgo.love: A calm approach will resolve previous misunderstandings in relationships.
virgo.career: Your dedication and hard work will be recognized. Stay persistent.

libra.general: Today calls for balance. Strive to find harmony in your surroundings.
libra.love: Romance thrives on mutual understanding; take time to listen and communicate.
libra.career: Collaboration will lead to fruitful outcomes, so work closely with your colleagues.

scorpio.general: Intensity is your friend today. Dive deep into projects that capture your passion.
scorpio.love: Vulnerability can strengthen bonds. Don't be afraid to share your feelings.
scorpio.career: Your determination will set the pace for others. Lead by example.

sagittarius.general: Adventure beckons! Seek new experiences that expand your horizons.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity will add excitement to your love life. Embrace the unexpected.
sagittarius.career: A new opportunity may arise that aligns with your adventurous spirit.

capricorn.general: Today is ideal for making practical plans that lead you toward your long-term goals.
capricorn.love: Your grounded nature will attract someone who appreciates stability.
capricorn.career: Your hard work will begin to pay off with recognition from higher-ups.

aquarius.general: Innovation is key today. Don't hesitate to think outside the box.
aquarius.love: Embrace your unique qualities—they're what make you attractive to others.
aquarius.career: Collaboration on new ideas will lead to success. Share your thoughts freely.

pisces.general: Emotional intuition guides you today. Pay attention to your feelings.
pisces.love: Nurturing relationships will help deepen your connections.
pisces.career: Creative projects will inspire you to push boundaries and stand out.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Do more things that make you forget to check your phone.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Stay close to what makes you feel alive.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream big. Work hard. Stay focused.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Science and technology revolutionize our lives, but memory, tradition and myth frame our response.
tech.author: Arthur M. Schlesinger Jr.

tech.text: The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers.
tech.author: Sydney J. Harris

tech.text: Technology is nothing. What’s important is that you have a faith in people that they’re basically good and smart.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

fun.text: If you think you are too small to be effective, you have never been in bed with a mosquito.
fun.author: Betty Reese

fun.text: I’m on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not too sure.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: I’m not arguing. I’m just explaining why I’m right.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Faith does not eliminate questions. But faith knows where to take them.
faith.author: Elisabeth Elliot

faith.text: Nothing is impossible to a willing heart.
faith.author: John Christian

faith.text: Your faith can move mountains, and your doubt can create them.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: The invariable mark of wisdom is to see the miraculous in the common.
wisdom.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the first step is silence, the second listening, the third remembering.
wisdom.author: Solomon Ibn Gabirol
